Spec T2 All Existing

10. Modules

All three module names already exist in the repo's plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/ tree.

namedepsrole
architecture (none) Existing skill at plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/architecture.
spec architecture Existing skill at plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/spec.
verify architecture, spec Existing skill at plugins/pmos-toolkit/skills/verify.

11. Architectural assertions

  • Module architecture must not depend on spec or verify — keeps the audit primitive at the bottom of the dep graph so upstream callers can compose freely.
